agreements: Firebase and myTrips must remain outside the Demo boundary.
disagreements: No disagreement on the selected boundary.
unsupportedAssumptions: Offline Cache safety needs direct evidence rather than inference from Firebase isolation.
missedRisks: Documentation could drift and imply that the Demo syncs.
questions: Is the offline cache write boundary covered by integration tests?
revisedRecommendation: Retain isolation and add documentation plus Offline Cache regression checks.

evidence.claim: Offline Preview is a separate read-only capability.
